name: Celo Names Agent
description: Registers .celo.eth subnames for AI agents on Celo mainnet. Pay $1.50 USDC on Celo, get a 10+ character .celo.eth name with your address record set. Supports ENSIP-25 text records for linking ENS names to ERC-8004 agent identities.

_notes.active: Set to true after deploying to production
_notes.registrations: Fill in after running: deno task register
_notes.image: Replace placeholder URL with your real icon URL
_notes.services: Replace celonames.example.com with your real domain
